courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Impact and Hit-Stop Game
genericDescription: Use animation timing to communicate force; apply hit-stop, screen shake, particles, and sound without obscuring play; tune feedback intensity.
specificDescription: Build an action game centered on impacts. Include at least three feedback layers per successful action and an options toggle to reduce camera shake or intense effects.
gradingRubric: 30 pts impact readability; 20 pts feedback layering; 20 pts playability under effects; 15 pts accessibility toggle; 15 pts reflection.
